parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error || 'Event not found', code: $json.code || 'EVENT_NOT_FOUND', message: $json.message || 'The requested event could not be found' }) }}

={{ const e = $json; JSON.stringify({ success: true, timezone: 'America/Asuncion', event: { id: e.id, summary: e.summary || '(No title)', description: e.description || '', location: e.location || '', start: e.start?.dateTime || e.start?.date, end: e.end?.dateTime || e.end?.date, htmlLink: e.htmlLink, status: e.status, created: e.created, updated: e.updated, creator: e.creator?.email || '', organizer: e.organizer?.email || '', attendees: e.attendees?.map(a => ({ email: a.email, displayName: a.displayName || '', responseStatus: a.responseStatus })) || [], hangoutLink: e.hangoutLink || '', conferenceData: e.conferenceData ? { conferenceId: e.conferenceData.conferenceId, entryPoints: e.conferenceData.entryPoints?.map(ep => ({ entryPointType: ep.entryPointType, uri: ep.uri, label: ep.label })) } : null, recurringEventId: e.recurringEventId || '', attachments: e.attachments?.map(att => ({ title: att.title, fileUrl: att.fileUrl })) || [], colorId: e.colorId || '', transparency: e.transparency || 'opaque', visibility: e.visibility || 'default' } }) }}
